expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly names the case focus and anti-compression requirement, e.g. in execution_notes.md: "Phase 4b purpose and case focus... canonical top-layer grouping" and "preserve scenario granularity (anti-compression)"; and in result.md: "canonical top-layer grouping without collapsing scenarios".

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4b
expectations.evidence: The produced result is framed around phase4b and evaluates phase4b-required artifacts, e.g. result.md: "Verdict: Not demonstrable / Blocked for phase4b" and discusses required phase4b outputs ("phase4b_spawn_manifest.json", "drafts/qa_plan_phase4b_r<round>.md") per "references/phase4b-contract.md".
